# Ashik Sharon M

> AI Engineer building agentic systems, RAG pipelines, and MLOps infrastructure.

## Who this is

Ashik Sharon M is an AI Engineer currently at CobuildX.ai (Jun 2026–present), building
agentic AI features and MCP (Model Context Protocol) tool integrations for WarpX, a
collaborative workspace platform — a React/TypeScript frontend and a Python FastAPI backend
on AWS Lambda.

Previously, he was a Graduate Technical Intern in AI Engineering at Intel Technology India
(Jul 2025–Feb 2026), where he built a multi-agent LLM ticket-automation system (35–45% lower
model cost) and an enterprise GraphRAG platform (LlamaIndex, Neo4j, FAISS).

He is finishing an M.Tech in Computer Science & Engineering (AI & Machine Learning) at
Vellore Institute of Technology (VIT), and holds a B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering
from Loyola-ICAM College of Engineering & Technology (Anna University).

## Patents & research

- Patent published (2026): "Adaptive Multi-Agent Generative AI System for Automated Legal
  Contract Drafting and Advisory" — a multi-agent architecture (Clause Selector, Drafter,
  Compliance, Verifier) for legal document automation.
- Patent published (2026): "Hardware-Accelerated Semantic Downlink of Synthetic Aperture
  Radar (SAR) Data with Onboard Vision-Language Models."
- Paper under review, Journal of Applied Earth Observation and Geoinformation (Elsevier):
  "Zero-Shot Land Cover Classification of SAR-like Imagery using Vision-Language Models (VLMs)."

## Open source

- Meta FAISS — PR #4792 (merged): fixed a multi-platform CI regression.
  https://github.com/facebookresearch/faiss/pull/4792
- Google DeepMind Gemma — PR #590 (merged): fixed a runtime crash in Sampler.sample().
  https://github.com/google-deepmind/gemma/pull/590

## Selected projects

- PoliRAG — enterprise policy/compliance RAG engine with hybrid BM25+FAISS retrieval.
  https://github.com/ashiksharonm/PoliRAG-Enterprise-Policy-Compliance-Intelligence-Engine
- AlphaGuard — production ML defect-detection system for steel manufacturing.
  https://github.com/ashiksharonm/alphaguard
- MCP Server POC — an Agent Tool Gateway for LLM-based agents.
  https://github.com/ashiksharonm/mcp-server-poc
- libmalloc — a from-scratch C memory allocator.
  https://github.com/ashiksharonm/libmalloc
